title: Eggless Rasmalai cake — custom made in Harris Park for Parramatta orders
summary:
Rasmalai is not a flavour most cake shops in Parramatta stock. It's rarer still as a 100% eggless option.

At Num Nums Harris Park, it's on the standard menu. Fifteen flavours total — including Mango, Rasmalai, and Ferrero Rocher — all eggless, no exceptions. No need to check or ask. The default is inclusive.

The Rasmalai sponge is oil-based, which directly affects texture: it stays moist 2–3 days after pickup. That matters when you're ordering for a birthday gathering in Granville or a Diwali table in Westmead and the cake sits out.

Six sizes from $39.99 (6-inch, serves 6–8) to $134.99 (16-inch, serves 50–55). Custom design from your photo reference. 48-hour minimum notice — that's what fresh baking actually takes.

Order on WhatsApp: +61 425 697 725. Pickup from Wigram Street, Harris Park. Open daily until 10pm.
keywords: Rasmalai cake no eggs Western Sydney
